channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Sirens, Strikes, Shattered Deal: Middle East On Edge As US, Iran Trade Blows

media:content.media:description: Behind this latest flare-up lies a collapsed peace effort.

item.description: Iran's health ministry said at least 50 people had been killed and more than 500 wounded in the latest wave of US strikes.
item.content:encoded: Iran's health ministry said at least 50 people had been killed and more than 500 wounded in the latest wave of US strikes.

item.title: Days After Indonesia Boat Sinking 2 Survivors Found On Uninhabited Island

media:content.media:description: About 50 people were rescued on Thursday, officials said.

item.description: The vessel, which was carrying more than 70 people, sank on Wednesday as it sailed near Selayar, a small island south of the larger Sulawesi.
item.content:encoded: The vessel, which was carrying more than 70 people, sank on Wednesday as it sailed near Selayar, a small island south of the larger Sulawesi.

item.title: Instagram And Facebook Down? Thousands Report Login And Posting Issues

media:content.media:description: Outage appeared to be a widespread system issue rather than regional glitches.

item.description: Meta has not yet released a statement, but Downdetector's live map showed that the volume of new complaints was beginning to taper off.
item.content:encoded: Meta has not yet released a statement, but Downdetector's live map showed that the volume of new complaints was beginning to taper off.

item.title: 1 Killed, 16 Injured in One of Russia's Largest Missile Barrages Yet On Kyiv

media:content.media:description: Kyiv has for months been targeting Russia's oil industry

item.description: US President Donald Trump has said he is prepared to grant Ukraine licenses to produce Patriots, the most effective means of intercepting Russian ballistic missiles, potentially bolstering Kyiv's defences against similar Russian strikes.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump has said he is prepared to grant Ukraine licenses to produce Patriots, the most effective means of intercepting Russian ballistic missiles, potentially bolstering Kyiv's defences against similar Russian strikes.

item.title: 7 Million Abusive Comments Aimed At Players, Staff Detected During World Cup

media:content.media:description: FIFA said the detection rate was 14 times higher than the 2022 edition.

item.description: Earlier this month, FIFA said racial abuse accounted for 11% of detected offensive messages during the World Cup so far.
item.content:encoded: Earlier this month, FIFA said racial abuse accounted for 11% of detected offensive messages during the World Cup so far.

item.title: New Rule In Israel Allows Use Of Crocodiles To Stop Prison Escapes

media:content.media:description: Ben Gvir intends to deploy crocodiles around Ketziot prison.

item.description: Far-right National Security Minister Itamar Ben Gvir -- who reportedly proposed in December surrounding a prison for Palestinian detainees with crocodiles, a la Florida's "Alligator Alcatraz" immigration detention facility -- welcomed the decision.
item.content:encoded: Far-right National Security Minister Itamar Ben Gvir -- who reportedly proposed in December surrounding a prison for Palestinian detainees with crocodiles, a la Florida's "Alligator Alcatraz" immigration detention facility -- welcomed the decision.

item.title: German Parliament Leader Resigns Due To Pressure Over Surrogate Baby

media:content.media:description: Surrogacy is prohibited in Germany.

item.description: Jens Spahn drew heavy criticism after news emerged that he had become a parent with his husband through a surrogate mother.
item.content:encoded: Jens Spahn drew heavy criticism after news emerged that he had become a parent with his husband through a surrogate mother.

item.title: Ukraine Release Video Of Bombing In Monaco That Injured Tycoon, His Family

media:content.media:description: The June 30 attack deeply shook the discreet and ultra-wealthy principality on the Mediterranean coast.

item.description: The suspected perpetrator, Anastasiia Berezovska, was found dead in Ukraine a few days later.
item.content:encoded: The suspected perpetrator, Anastasiia Berezovska, was found dead in Ukraine a few days later.

item.title: 31-Year-Old Diver Survives After Being Bitten By Nearly 7-Foot Shark In Australia

media:content.media:description: Broadnose sevengill sharks are distinguished by their seven gill slits,

item.description: The diver was about 165 feet from shore and roughly 26 feet underwater when he was bitten on the lower forearm by what authorities believe was a broadnose sevengill shark measuring about 6.5 feet long.
item.content:encoded: The diver was about 165 feet from shore and roughly 26 feet underwater when he was bitten on the lower forearm by what authorities believe was a broadnose sevengill shark measuring about 6.5 feet long.

item.title: US Plans MAGA-Aligned Grants In Europe To Fight EU Censorship Laws: Report

media:content.media:description: The report cited a copy of a notice the State Department sent to lawmakers.

item.description: The proposed grants include $2 million to "counter censorship" stemming from EU regulations
item.content:encoded: The proposed grants include $2 million to "counter censorship" stemming from EU regulations

item.title: Chinese Woman Nearly Cremated After Coma Rebuilds Life Through Painting

media:content.media:description: She later specialised in traditional Chinese painting.

item.description: Chen returned to Dongguan to thank the funeral home and hospital staff who had saved her life.
item.content:encoded: Chen returned to Dongguan to thank the funeral home and hospital staff who had saved her life.

item.title: Trump's Firm To Charge $100,000 A Month For Faster Feed Of His Posts: Report

media:content.media:description: Trump's social media posts often move markets.

item.description: Trump Media & Technology Group, which owns Truth Social, has in recent weeks also pitched a discounted plan of $60,000 per month if the firms sign up for a three-year plan, the sources said
item.content:encoded: Trump Media & Technology Group, which owns Truth Social, has in recent weeks also pitched a discounted plan of $60,000 per month if the firms sign up for a three-year plan, the sources said

item.title: New UK PM Andy Burnham To Drop Digital ID Plan To Focus On Living Costs

media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham becomes Britain's seventh prime minister in a decade on Monday.

item.description: Resources devoted to the scheme, deemed a "fiasco" by a cross-party committee of lawmakers, will be redirected to Burnham's priorities, a spokesperson said.
item.content:encoded: Resources devoted to the scheme, deemed a "fiasco" by a cross-party committee of lawmakers, will be redirected to Burnham's priorities, a spokesperson said.

item.title: Why Trump's Saudi Nuclear Deal Is Facing Delay Despite Being Ready

media:content.media:description: The draft deal was reportedly finalised in October 2025.

item.description: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman has previously said that if Iran develops a nuclear weapon, Saudi Arabia would also seek one.
item.content:encoded: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman has previously said that if Iran develops a nuclear weapon, Saudi Arabia would also seek one.

item.title: "Tortured, Forced To Work Day And Night": Hyderabad Woman Stuck In Oman

media:content.media:description: The woman sent a self-recorded video to a politician in Hyderabad

item.description: Shabnam Begum said she traveled to Oman on March 26 after a local recruitment agent promised her a job as a housemaid.
item.content:encoded: Shabnam Begum said she traveled to Oman on March 26 after a local recruitment agent promised her a job as a housemaid.

item.title: Delayed Orders, Missing Gear: What Hindered Venezuela's Quake Response

media:content.media:description: The limited presence of security forces was due to delays in deployment orders.

item.description: Civilians spearheaded much of the response, especially during the first two days, bringing aid like food and using rudimentary tools to pull both the living and the dead from the rubble.
item.content:encoded: Civilians spearheaded much of the response, especially during the first two days, bringing aid like food and using rudimentary tools to pull both the living and the dead from the rubble.

item.title: China Launches World's Largest Open AI Model To Rival US Tech Giants

media:content.media:description: Chinese AI firms are accelerating their model release cycles as the global AI race intensifies.

item.description: Moonshot said Kimi K3 is the first open-weight model to approach the 3 trillion-parameter mark and is designed for advanced reasoning, long-horizon coding and knowledge work.
item.content:encoded: Moonshot said Kimi K3 is the first open-weight model to approach the 3 trillion-parameter mark and is designed for advanced reasoning, long-horizon coding and knowledge work.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: US Says Latest Strikes Targeted Iran Guards Behind Jordan Attack

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War News LIVE: The US-Iran tensions have escalated in recent days

item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Iran claimed it destroyed "several US refuelling aircraft and fighter jets" and caused "serious damage to many more".
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Iran claimed it destroyed "several US refuelling aircraft and fighter jets" and caused "serious damage to many more".

item.title: "He's War Criminal": Zohran Mamdani Wants To Arrest Netanyahu During New York Trip

media:content.media:description: Mamdani had earlier pledged to arrest Netanyahu during his campaign for mayor.

item.description: Zohran Mamdani said he is not sure if he has the power to order the arrest of a foreign leader and that he is consulting the city's legal advisers regarding the issue.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1129720/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Zohran Mamdani said he is not sure if he has the power to order the arrest of a foreign leader and that he is consulting the city's legal advisers regarding the issue.

item.title: US Strikes To "Punish" Iran, Tehran Vows To Teach "Unforgettable Lessons"

media:content.media:description: US and Iran have resumed trading strikes after signing a deal last month

item.description: The US launched the eighth consecutive night of strikes hours after announcing that two American soldiers were killed in Iran's attack on Jordan.
item.content:encoded: The US launched the eighth consecutive night of strikes hours after announcing that two American soldiers were killed in Iran's attack on Jordan.
